subject: A hooded or helmeted humanoid figure pressed against a stone wall in a dim interior, holding a blade
description: A humanoid figure hugs the surface of a stone wall in what appears to be a dimly lit corridor or passage. The figure wears a distinctive helm or headgear with a glowing green serpentine or decorative element along the crest. The body is partially wrapped in pale cloth or wrappings. A blade is visible at the figure's side. The lighting is very low-key — mostly dark with greenish rim light from the helm. The posture is crouched and furtive, suggesting stealth.
foreground: Crouched figure pressed against stone wall; ornate helm with glowing green crest; blade at side
background: Dark stone wall; faint reddish stain on wall surface
emotion: tense stillness — figure flattened against the wall, concealed and waiting
